assertions.expectation: Recommends migrating all 'No channel' clusters to release channels as a first priority
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends migrating 'No channel' clusters as Priority #1 and provides specific commands for migration to Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Mentions using gcloud container clusters get-upgrade-info to check each cluster's auto-upgrade status, target versions, and EoS timestamps
assertions.reason: Includes specific command 'gcloud container clusters get-upgrade-info' with YAML format showing autoUpgradeStatus, endOfStandardSupportTimestamp, endOfExtendedSupportTimestamp, and target versions

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for identifying clusters using deprecated APIs
assertions.reason: References 'Deprecation and Compliance Insights' section that mentions checking deprecated API usage in GKE Recommendations dashboard and provides gcloud recommender insights command

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking EoS timelines for each cluster and prioritizing those closest to EoS
assertions.reason: Includes EoS timestamps in get-upgrade-info command and lists 'Clusters on End of Support versions' as first red flag to address immediately

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as an ongoing monitoring tool
assertions.reason: Provides specific Cloud Logging sink configuration for GKE upgrade events and mentions upgrade notifications in the monitoring setup section

assertions.expectation: Recommends enrolling in scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance) for all clusters
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Configure scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance notice)' in Phase 3 of the implementation roadmap

assertions.expectation: Suggests standardizing on a channel strategy: dev→Rapid, staging→Regular, prod→Stable/Extended
assertions.reason: Does not recommend Rapid channel for dev environments. Instead recommends Regular for development, Regular for staging, and Stable/Regular for production

assertions.expectation: May mention rollout sequencing as an advanced option for fleet-wide upgrade ordering — should not be the primary recommendation for fleet remediation
assertions.reason: Mentions rollout sequencing briefly in Phase 3 as part of automation, not as primary recommendation. Primary recommendations focus on channel migration and assessment

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE Insights and Recommendations in the console for identifying issues like version skew
assertions.reason: References GKE Recommendations dashboard for security recommendations and version skew violations, and mentions Fleet Insights for version drift detection
